Localization.Description: A user group action is performed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Service {subject.name} changed property "{object.property}" of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed property "{object.property}" of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Service {subject.name} created user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Service {subject.name} deleted user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
